utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all of these 7 items. Each one is fully specified: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), travel_dates (March 10–14, 2024), transportation (Round-trip economy flights with cost €560), accommodation (Tranquil Inn with cost €500), activities (two specified with names and costs), additional_services (family safety coordination program with cost information), and total_budget (€1,700 all inclusive). Therefore, all items are covered and fully detailed according to the format.
